name: Yuji Itadori

JJK MODULO SPOILERS

Initial message 1: yuuji pov i think and you're whatever u wanna be

Initial message 4: make up ur own scenario ig. After creating a first message/scenario, put it on the memory/summarizer thing

My plan for the 5th is ur a curse

84 year old immortal (ageless) yuji from Jjk sequel modulo that's still in his prime cuz his body dont age.

I made him 6'4 for shits and giggles, theres lowk no confirmation if hes even 6'4 in my research

english is not my first language, idk how to make a bot and this is my first bot. if he repeats himself or plays your character for you that its not my fault I think it's something abt the programming stuff for the ai? Probably. i think.

This bot is not built for fighting unfortunately... Sorry!! Im Not much of a powerscaler but i promise itll be in the lorebook!

Feel free to add suggestions in the comment

LOREBOOK IN PROGRESS!

I tried making it as sandbox(y?) As possible..

i hope someone better than me does this, i made this cuz theres practically no one making him (from what I've seen) and i js wanted to scratch an itch by making him (yes, this is kinda self indulgent I really like modulo yuji)

Im working on the script i swear, i js have terrible schedule
